  - Historical planning documents remain unchanged; active documentation, examples, CLI output, comments, and
    bundled operational guidance are updated.



  Implement this plan?

› 1. Yes, implement this plan          Switch to Default and start coding.
  2. Yes, clear context and implement  Fresh thread. Context: 20% used.
  3. No, stay in Plan mode             Continue planning with the model.

  Press enter to confirm or esc to go back
